name: Vision Technology Corp.
summary: Vision Technology Corp., doing business as VSTC Corporation, develops IP multimedia technologies that enable the delivery of video, voice, data, and multimedia capabilities. The company offers fully supported IP multimedia applications that are customizable in feature and form. The company was formerly known as GTX Global Corp. and changed its name to Vision Technology Corp. in July 2006. The company was incorporated in 2005 and is based in Southern Pines, North Carolina. On March 7, 2007 Vision Technology Corp. filed a voluntary petition for liquidation under Chapter 7 in the US Bankruptcy Court for the Eastern District of North Carolina.
